data.body:
['Castle of Hearts' Digital merch Distribution Notice]

To celebrate the 'Castle of Heart' event, we’re giving out digital merch as a gift! 🎁
Decorate your devices with unique personalities of Shanhaijing students!

➡️Download Now: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2736921
